response.justification: Bogdan has strong general engineering fundamentals and meaningful scale experience (millions of HTTP requests/second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby), but the resume shows no direct work with experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry systems, or growth measurement—all of which are the core deliverables of this Principal-level role. His current Staff title and trajectory suggest seniority below IC6, and while he demonstrates breadth across languages and domains, the specialized growth/experimentation platform expertise required for this position is entirely absent from his history.
strengths: ~20 years of engineering experience with demonstrated ability to work at high throughput scale (millions of req/s at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby)
Polyglot engineer fluent in JavaScript/TypeScript, C/C++, Java, and C#, covering most required languages in the JD
Strong testing culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and open-source contributions indicate engineering discipline and craft
concerns: Zero explicit experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management—the central technical domain of this role
No evidence of telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, or statistical/data analysis work required for growth measurement systems
Current and past titles are Senior/Staff, not Principal; no demonstrated cross-team architectural leadership at the IC6 scope described

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure work
